channel.title: Latest from Android Central
channel.description: All the latest content from the Android Central team

item.title: Best Motorola Razr Plus 2026 cases
item.description: As slim and small as the phone is, you can never go wrong by investing in one or two of the best Motorola Razr Plus 2026 cases for some extra protection.
item.author: namerah.saud-fatmi@futurenet.com (Namerah Saud Fatmi)
item.dc:creator: Namerah Saud Fatmi

media:content.media:description: Motorola Razr Plus 2026 material

media:content.media:title: Motorola Razr Plus 2026 material

item.title: Google's May security patch for Pixels is here, targeting charging and display
item.description: Google rolls out its monthly security update, which again targets the Pixel 10's display problems, but also fixes a grueling wireless charging issue.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: A jade Google Pixel 10 Pro and a white Google Pixel 10 Pro XL with their respective boxes
media:content.media:text: A jade Google Pixel 10 Pro and a white Google Pixel 10 Pro XL with their respective boxes
media:content.media:title: A jade Google Pixel 10 Pro and a white Google Pixel 10 Pro XL with their respective boxes

item.title: Samsung Galaxy Z Flip 8 vs. Motorola Razr Ultra 2026: The fight for the best flip phone of the year
item.description: The Galaxy Z Flip 8 is expected to be a refinement, while the Razr Ultra (2026) already brings bigger battery, faster charging, and flagship specs.
item.author: sanujb6@gmail.com (Sanuj Bhatia)
item.dc:creator: Sanuj Bhatia

media:content.media:description: Motorola Razr Ultra 2026 on a white platform
media:content.media:text: Motorola Razr Ultra 2026 on a white platform
media:content.media:title: Motorola Razr Ultra 2026 on a white platform

item.title: Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 8 vs. Motorola Razr Fold: Samsung's next foldable has serious competition
item.description: The Galaxy Z Fold 8 is expected to compete with Motorola's newly launched Razr Fold.
item.author: sanujb6@gmail.com (Sanuj Bhatia)
item.dc:creator: Sanuj Bhatia

media:content.media:description: Hands-on with the Motorola Razr Fold alongside the Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 7 at MWC 2026.

media:content.media:title: Hands-on with the Motorola Razr Fold alongside the Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 7 at MWC 2026.

item.title: It's happening: Apple's iOS 26.5 prepares RCS encryption with Android
item.description: Apple highlighted the upcoming arrival of encrypted RCS messages between iPhones and Androids in its new iOS 26.5 update.

item.title: This viral Verizon deal supposedly gets you a free Samsung phone, tablet, AND smartwatch — but how exactly does it work?

item.title: Google Home rolls out a hassle-free automation update, 'Ask Home' heads to PC

item.title: Is the Motorola Razr 2026 waterproof?

item.title: Exclusive: Next-generation TCL NXTPAPER aims to fix everything that's wrong with OLED
item.description: NXTPAPER is getting a complete overhaul in 2026, swapping out LCD for OLED, further lowering blue light output, increasing color gamut, and more.
item.dc:creator: Nicholas Sutrich

item.title: Clip this: Netflix's new mobile design is all about short videos and scrolling

item.title: Qualcomm FY Q2 2026 earnings highlight a mobile industry under pressure from the memory shortage
